bullets: Lead a 14-person engineering team (7 developers, 2 reverse engineers, 2 L2 diagnostics experts, DevOps, 2 QA) building a real-time desktop application for intellectual/skill-based online games statistics and analytics; own architecture, roadmap, and the release pipeline shipping to 10+ target online platforms. Hands-on across the stack: C# / .NET backend, Kotlin Android companion app serving up to 2.5k DAU (including an accessibility-based input automation engine), CI/CD, dynamic server configuration.

Led a platform-wide migration of 10+ production integrations onto a new shared core in a single coordinated sweep.

Continued maintenance of the Android companion app (Kotlin) and internal annotation frameworks.
